events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer raw JSON. Scenario: tool/material package for conductor selection & sizing matches size, rating, application on referenced sheet. Staged parts clean intact sized. Reference NEC 310, Table 310.16. We need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since described as matching, likely pass. Need fill all fields. Work_stage: staged. Component_conditions none -> empty list. percent_complete 0? Staged maybe 0. Value 0. Sound source etc defaults. Order empty, workable empty. Findings empty. Actions empty. Rationale: selected conductors/tools/materials match NEC 310/310.16 and job sheet; no defects observed at staging. References: NEC 310, Table 310.16. Risk low. Need output only JSON object. Ensure valid.
